mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_wem_factor ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_wem_factor WHERE factor_type = #{factorType} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_wem_factor WHERE factor_type = #{factorType}
SELECT * FROM tb_wem_factor WHERE factor_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR factor_name_en LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_wem_factor WHERE factor_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR factor_name_en LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_wem_factor (factor_name, factor_name_en, cas_number, factor_type, twa, stel, ceiling_value, unit, msds_linked, is_permitted, used_process, remarks, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, created_by_team, created_by_position, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, modified_by_team, modified_by_position, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{factorName}, #{factorNameEn}, #{casNumber}, #{factorType}, #{twa}, #{stel}, #{ceilingValue}, #{unit}, #{msdsLinked}, #{isPermitted}, #{usedProcess}, #{remarks}, #{createdByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modifiedByName}, #{modifiedByTeam}, #{modifiedByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_wem_factor SET factor_name = #{factorName}, factor_name_en = #{factorNameEn}, cas_number = #{casNumber}, factor_type = #{factorType}, twa = #{twa}, stel = #{stel}, ceiling_value = #{ceilingValue}, unit = #{unit}, msds_linked = #{msdsLinked}, is_permitted = #{isPermitted}, used_process = #{usedProcess}, remarks = #{remarks}, modified_by_user_id = #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modified_by_name = #{modifiedByName}, modified_by_team = #{modifiedByTeam}, modified_by_position = #{modifiedByPosition}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
